# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy_staging
  - deploy_prod

default:
  interruptible: true

variables:
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN: "30 days"

workflow:
  rules:
    - when: always

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - mkdir -p dist/bin dist/config dist/scripts
    - printf '#!/usr/bin/env sh\nset -e\necho "Running app binary (placeholder)";\n' > dist/bin/app
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - printf 'env=default\n' > dist/config/app.conf
    - printf '#!/usr/bin/env sh\nset -e\necho "Deploying to: ${TARGET_ENV}"\n./dist/bin/app\necho "Using config:"\ncat ./dist/config/app.conf\n' > dist/scripts/deploy.sh
    - chmod +x dist/scripts/deploy.sh
    - tar -czf dist/package.tgz -C dist bin config scripts
  artifacts:
    name: "build-${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - dist/
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE_IN
    when: always

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - test -f dist/bin/app
    - test -f dist/config/app.conf
    - test -f dist/scripts/deploy.sh
    - ./dist/bin/app

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy_staging
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  variables:
    TARGET_ENV: "staging"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
      when: on_success
  environment:
    name: staging
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - chmod +x dist/scripts/deploy.sh
    - ./dist/scripts/deploy.sh

deploy_prod:
  stage: deploy_prod
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  variables:
    TARGET_ENV: "production"
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
  environment:
    name: production
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - chmod +x dist/scripts/deploy.sh
    - ./dist/scripts/deploy.sh
